content: New f2p player here, looking for some team comp ideas. I’ve already got a few reliable ones, but I’m looking for some pointers
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
- [Damage Formula](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652) by Jynn             
- [How To Aliemus 101 & 102](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304) by Jynn  
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

she can fit in doresain team if you want to find a spot for her
and caro kath, if for somereason you want to do that
Leigh czn be ran with pretty much any caro team
Her kit isnt really limited to any specific team

Hey all, been running with -Jenkin, 24, Ryker, Horla as my team. But it's feeling a little unfocused, and 24 is falling off. Jenkins keeps killing bosses, but it feels like that won't last forever.

Here's what I got. Any suggestions on teams that can work together?

I have a proto-paradise and prototype horizon as well as a book for a free card, so I can get one more character from the basics and upgrade one person once so far.

Any teams that could be used to teach me things? Since I learn better by using than reading.

Also, just any teams that synergize well with what I have?
kath can be a good carry if you can get her to E3
other than that, you dont have a good carry atm
any general advice who to get for doll centered teams
currently using this
You dont need karen in this,  having another shielder will help more
Salvador is a good choice for more con stat and shield
ill try that, thanks

Also, any info on a g Murphy rerun?
There will probably be a rerun in half anni
1 more month perhaps

I suggest swapping Uvhash for Aigis in Ghelot-Uvhash-Faint-Pickman
Aigis is a vuln bot and , on devour exalt, provide 1 free turn to you, very helpful if you need one turn of breathing room.
Oooh
Vulnerable is a 50% more damage multiplier which will greatly help Ghelot smash even more heads
Is there any improvements I could make to my tentacle team
Or is it set

alsooo use R wheels like Gluttony, Emerge, Whisper and Frenzy on your supports! They can carry your run because of their effects.

Gluttony for instance gives you +max HP if you don't choose any orisons
cornonthemacabre provided feedback on your tentacle team , probably swap out Sanga for a vuln bot
Idk who vuln bots are <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Aigis' A Small wish and exalt provides Vulnerable. Playing any aigis cards while she is Roused also provides vulnerable.

Ogier provides vulnerable on his 2-cost , Piercing strike. He also provides temp str on exalt.

Caecus and Erica provides vulnerable on their exalt.
Ogier also can provide fat shields if you need since Gmurphy's Divine Aequor White stance has a cooldown of 3 turns
